escalation.rationale: Russia deployed hypersonic Oreshnik missile against Kyiv region while US-Iran peace talks show progress amid continued regional strikes.

ticker_items: Russia strikes Ukraine with hypersonic Oreshnik missile, 2-4 killed in Kyiv region
US Secretary Rubio hints at imminent Iran peace deal within hours
Iran says major gaps remain in US talks despite progress reports
Israeli strikes continue in Gaza and southern Lebanon despite ceasefire
Pakistan deploys 8,000 troops to Saudi Arabia under defense treaty

eastern_europe.description: Russia launched largest missile attack of war using Iskander, Kalibr, Zircon and Oreshnik hypersonic missiles against Kyiv.
Russia fired hypersonic Oreshnik missile along with hundreds of drones in major attack on Kyiv region.

middle_east.description: Israeli airstrikes killed 11 people including 6 paramedics and a child in southern Lebanon.
Israeli airstrikes killed family of three and five police officers in residential areas.
Israeli strikes killed 6 paramedics and 5 civilians including a child.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths

ukraine.text: Russia used the powerful hypersonic Oreshnik ballistic missile during a mass drone and missile attack on Kyiv
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: Ukrainian President

ukraine.text: The Russians are considering scenarios for additional attacks against Ukraine – targeting our northern regions, our Chernihiv-Kyiv direction from Belarus
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President

middle_east.text: Major gaps remain in US talks
middle_east.speaker: Tehran officials
middle_east.title: Iranian government

middle_east.text: I do think perhaps there is the possibility that in the next few hours the world will get some good news
middle_east.speaker: Marco Rubio
middle_east.title: US Secretary of State

middle_east.text: A large portion of issues with the US have been resolved, but a deal is not imminent
middle_east.speaker: Baghaei
middle_east.title: Iran FM Spokesman

observers.description: Reports emerged that China secretly trained Russian troops who have since fought in Ukraine. Xi Jinping is reportedly planning a visit to North Korea to mediate US-North Korea tensions.
Pakistan army chief Asim Munir arrived in Tehran as mediation efforts to secure a US-Iran peace deal intensify. Pakistan has also deployed 8,000 troops to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty.

Belarus conducted joint nuclear drills with Russia involving 65,000 personnel and 200 missile systems from May 19-21. Ukraine warns of potential Russian attacks from Belarusian territory targeting northern Ukrainian regions.

financial.notes: Shipping professionals in Dubai considering relocation to Greece amid Gulf conflict concerns.

update_log.text: Iran says major gaps remain in US peace talks despite Trump's optimism about imminent deal
Russia deploys hypersonic Oreshnik missile against Bila Tserkva in Kyiv region, casualties reported
Israeli strikes kill multiple civilians in Gaza and southern Lebanon violating ceasefire
US Secretary Rubio suggests Iran peace deal could be announced within hours
Russia launched largest missile attack on Kyiv of entire war using advanced hypersonic weapons
Israeli strikes kill 11 including paramedics in southern Lebanon despite ceasefire
Reports suggest Trump claims US-Iran peace deal largely negotiated but Iran disputes terms
China reportedly trained Russian troops now fighting in Ukraine according to intelligence reports
